training_status: gym training, including shoulder and chest presses

benefits.description: Completely reversed shoulder injury, avoided scheduled reconstruction surgery. Went from zero range of motion and pain to full weight shoulder and chest presses with no pain or concern.
Eliminated shoulder pain entirely; no gym activity brings pain or concern now.
Full recovery of shoulder ROM and strength.

protocol_notes: BPC pinned directly into the top of the shoulder (local site injection) daily; TB500 injected into abdomen 3x per week. User advocates for site-specific BPC injections due to its shorter half-life compared to TB500. References Dr. Hyman and Trevor Bachmeyer podcasts as supporting sources.
